    at_rg2022(coco_gauff)).

    iga_swiatek != rafael_nadal).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    coco_gauff != rafael_nadal).

    lost_to(X0,iga_swiatek) | ~female(X0) | ~at_rg2022(X0)).

    ~lost_to(X0,iga_swiatek) | ranked_highly(X0)).

    ~at_rg2022(X0) | male(X0) | female(X0)).
